'''changïflïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherweight|featherweight]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherweight|featherweight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| changïflïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || changïflïfth || changïflïfj || changïflïfsh || changïflïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || changïfngïflïfth || changïfngïflïfj || changïfngïflïfsh || changïfngïflïf
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || changïflïfïf || changïflïfïf || changïflïfïf || changïflïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || changïflïfth || changïflïfj || changïflïfsh || changïflïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || changïflïfïfl || changïflïfïfl || changïflïfïfl || changïflïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || changïflïfïfïf || changïflïfïfïf || changïflïfïfïf || changïflïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || changïflïfïfn || changïflïfïfn || changïflïfïfn || changïflïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || changïflïfïforo || changïflïfïforo || changïflïfïforo || changïflïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|086b4c8}}
